Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Wolf's Eye Agate

This item can be used in tradeskills.

Race: ALL

Plane of Knowledge
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2014 at 11:35 AM Rating: Decent
Ueuil
Scholar
19 posts
In the Plane of Knowledge, you can purchase these from Jeweler Nonny. He's a male gnome who stands in the small bank, directly across from Dogle Pitt, the banker.
▲ Page top
Update for the new decade...
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2012 at 3:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1648426809153
Scholar
19 posts
Since the zones have been changed alot of the information here is out dated... I checked East and West Freeport and could not find the Wolfs Eye Agate or even the venders that used to sell them. I DID still find them in the Commonlands (now all one zone) at /loc 171.49, -224.79, 25.36 from vender Lyth Spellstar. Cost for me was 3p 3g 5s 9c... These are needed to get the jewelcrafting trophy.
▲ Page top
Places you can buy it
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2006 at 3:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783130877
63 posts
I suspect nobody cares anymore, but there's so much bad info out there, I'd add what I've found.

Neriak Commons Genzal R`Jyen (mage supplies) has them.
EFP: Ennuard Yetaius and Ilenarn Ghaeaus
WFP: Mekoma Buma and Lysin Smokkan have them
Erudin Place Frena Runeflash and Harban Ranflash have them
South Qeynos: Hanlore Escaval
S. Felwithe: Jewyln

There may be other places too, but that should put a shop near wherever you are if you're in the old world.
▲ Page top
Places you can buy it

these are sold off of Lyth Spellstar in East Commonlands, she is at loc 270, 4910. She's at the very last building before zoning into WC

This can be found in Felwithe near the mage guild. There is a vendor outside the mage guild near the water. She carries the item. Merchant Jewyln.
